footer.tagline: Taageeraya nidaamka beeraha casri ah ee Soomaaliya iyo Bariga Afrika ee barwaaqo leh adeegyo suurtagal ah iyo horumar xirfadeed.

hero.headline: Dhisida Beeraha Casri ah ee Soomaaliya & Bariga Afrika
hero.subline: Barwaaqo Agri Group waxay bixisaa midho tayo leh, alaab beer ah, horumar biyo-mareen, iyo adeegyada la-talin beerta si loo taageero nidaamyo beer ah wax soo saar leh.

trustStrip.title: Aasaaska Beeraha Loo Kalsoon Yahay
trustStrip.subtitle: Laga Billabo Midho illaa Soo Saar — Waxaan Taageerno Tallaabbaad Kasta

aboutSection.title: Ku Saabsan Barwaaqo Agri Group
aboutSection.p1: Barwaaqo Agri Group waa shirkat horumar beer ah oo taageerta nidaamyo beeraha casri ah ee Soomaaliya iyo Bariga Afrika.
aboutSection.p2: Shaqadeenu waxay diiradda saartaa sidii loo wanaajin lahaa wax soo saarka beeraha, loo xoojin lahaa barnaamijyada taakulaynta beeraha, iyo sidii loo soo bandhigi lahaa alaab beer ah oo suurtagal ah iyo xalalka biyo-mareenta ee loo qalantay xaaladaha maxalli ah.

coreServices.label: Waxa Aan Sameyno
coreServices.title: Adeegyada Muhiimka Ah
coreServices.seedDesc: Bixinta midho tayo leh iyo alaab beer ah oo laga helo soosaarayaal ammaan ah.
coreServices.advisoryDesc: Bixinta tilmaam agronomy ah si loo wanaajiyo wax soo saarka beeraha iyo maareynta carada.
coreServices.irrigationDesc: Nakhshadeyn iyo fulinta nidaamyo biyo-mareen iyo infiraastabalka beerta casri ah.
coreServices.programsDesc: Taageerida beeraha barnaamijyo soo saar isku-xidhan iyo helitaanka alaab beer ah.

projectsSection.label: Gallery-gadeena
projectsSection.title: Mashruucyada La Doortay
projectsSection.baidoaDesc: Mashruuc biyo-mareen oo dhan 500 hektar u wanaajiya wax soo saarka biyaha, tusmaya xalallo Soomaaliya.
projectsSection.seedTrialsDesc: Qiimeyn xubnaha noocyada wax soo saarka sare leh ee loo qalantay carada maxalli ah, natiijo wanaajin beeraha bulshada.
projectsSection.advisoryDesc: Tababar agronomy iyo qorsheynta beeraha beeraha yar, wanaajinta wax soo saarka.

insightsSection.title: Faahfaahinta Beeraha
insightsSection.subtitle: Aqoon firfircoon iyo cusboonaysiinta kooxdeena agronomy ee duurka.
insightsSection.tomatoTitle: Habka Ugu Fiican ee Soo Saarka Tamarta Soomaaliya
insightsSection.tomatoDesc: Tilmaam buuxda oo ku saabsan daaqadaha beerida, xaaladaha cimilada, iyo doorashada noocyada wax soo saarka ugu badan.
insightsSection.dripTitle: Faaiidada Biyo-Mareenta Drip ee Beerida Khudaarta
insightsSection.dripDesc: Falanqaynta tignoolajiyada biyaha badbaadinta iyo saameynta wax soo saarka beeraha.
insightsSection.soilTitle: Hababka Diyaarinta Carada ee Beeraha Yar
insightsSection.soilDesc: Habab lagu xaqiijiyay ee wanaajinta caafimaadka carada iyo maareynta naqshadaha.

partnershipsSection.title: Isku-Shirka & Iskaashiga
partnershipsSection.subtitle: Barwaaqo Agri Group waxay la shaqeysaa soosaarayaasha midho, xirfadlayaasha agronomy, iyo ka-qaybqaatayaasha horumarka beeraha Bariga Afrika.

contactSection.title: Nala Shaqee
contactSection.subtitle: Diyaar u tahay inaannu wada shaqeyno? Noo soo dir fariin ama nala soo xiriir
contactSection.name: Magac

hero.title: Aasaaskeena
hero.subtitle: Si nakhshad leh waxaanu u beddelaynaa beeraha Soomaaliya ee adduunka iyo waxqabadyada maxalli ah.

visionMission.label: Ujeedada Nakhshadeed
visionMission.title: Xoojinta Awooda Cunnada Gobolka
visionMission.intro: Barwaaqo Agri Group waxay joogtaa isgoyska aqoonta dhaqameed ee maxalli ah iyo horumarka beeraha caalami ah. Ma ihi kaliya iibiyayaal; waxaan nahay ka-qaybqaatay infiraastabalka nakhshadeed ee loo dedegeliyay dhisida dhaqaale beer ah oo adkaysan Koonfurta Afrika.
visionMission.visionText: In la dhiso koridoor beer ah oo isku filan ee Bariga Afrika halkaas oo horumarku la kulmo wax soo saarka, adkeynta mustaqbalka beeraha.
visionMission.missionText: Markaan isku daranno agronomy horumarsan iyo alaab beer ah oo dunida ugu tayo leh, waxaanu awood u siinaynaa soosaarayaasha waaweyn iyo kuwa yar inay gaaraan wax soo saar joogto ah.

expertise.label: Dhibcadeena Adduunka
expertise.title: Keena Heerarka Adduunka Carrada Soomaaliya
expertise.intro: Barwaaqo Agri Group waxay bridge-ga u dhexeysaa horumarka beeraha caalami ah iyo fulinta duurka maxalli ah. Xirfadeena waxay noo ogolaanaysaa inaan si degdeg ah u kordhino hawlaha iyadoo la ilaaliyo wax soo saar tayo leh.
expertise.globalSupplyDesc: Isku-shir toos ah oo la socda soosaarayaasha midho iyo warshadaha alaabta Yurub iyo Aasiya, beeraha Soomaaliya heliya tignoolajiyada koowaad.
expertise.technicalAdvisoryDesc: Koox agronomists waaweyn oo bixiya qorsheynta beeraha iyo stratejiyada maareynta cayayaanka ee loo qalantay dhulka Soomaaliya.
expertise.irrigationSystemsDesc: Injineeniya xalallo maareyn biyaha oo ka dhigaya dhul qalalan beer khudaar iyo mid ah alaabta sannadka oo dhan.

foundation.label: Qiyamkeena
foundation.title: Aasaaska Barwaaqo
foundation.intro: Kororkeena waa la hanuuniyay mabda'aad dhexdooda ah oo hubinaya in maalgelin, isku-shir, iyo mashruuc kasta uga qayb qaato xasilloonida gobolka.
foundation.techLeadershipDesc: Waxaanu prioritize galeynna biyo-mareen AI iyo tignoolajiyada midho ee cimilada adkeysata mashruuc kasta.
foundation.operationalIntegrityDesc: Muugashadu waa calaamadeena. Laga bilaabo silsiladda adeegga illaa natiijooyinka duurka, waxaanu ilaalinaynaa heerarka ugu sarreeya ee ah.
foundation.adaptiveResilienceDesc: Nidaamkeena waa la dhisay inuu adkaysto cabashooyinka cimilada iyo gaadiidka ee gobolka Bariga Afrika.
foundation.inclusiveGrowthDesc: Waxaanu hubinaynaa guulkeena waaweyn inuu ugu tago bulshooyinka beeraha yar ee aqoonti.

hero.label: Xirfadeena
hero.title: Xalalka Beeraha & Adeegyada
hero.subtitle: Beeraha Soomaaliya waxaanu ku xoojinaynaa alaabta adduunka, tignoolajiyada casri ah, iyo tilmaamaha agronomy ee wax soo saarka waara.

detailed.seedDesc: Waxaanu bixinaa midho tayo leh, cimilada adkeysata iyo alaab beeraha muhiim ah oo laga helo ka-qaybqaatayaasha caalami ah.
detailed.irrigationDesc: Qorsheyn farsameed iyo fulinta nidaamyo maareyn biyaha wax ku ool ah.
detailed.advisoryDesc: Bridging-ga aqoonta ee adeegyada agronomy xirfadeed. Kooxdeena waxay bixisaa taageero duurka, falanqoon carro, iyo stratejiyada maareynta beeraha.

process.label: Habkeena
process.title: Sida Aan U Hawlgalno
process.step1Desc: Waxaanu falanqeeynaa xaaladda beertaada, tayada carrada, iyo u baahnaanta beeraha.
process.step2Desc: Qorsheyn gaar ah ee biyo-mareen, doorashada midho, iyo maareynta agronomy.
process.step3Desc: Bixinta alaabta iyo dhisida nidaamyo xirfadeed ee goobta.
process.step4Desc: La-talin duurka joogto ah iyo iibsashada si loo hubiyo wax soo saar ugu sarreeya.

seeds.heroSubtitle: Bixinta aasaaska guulaha wax soo saarka sare ee Bariga Afrika.
seeds.intro: Barwaaqo Agri Group waxay fahamsan tahay in tayada alaabta ay go'aamiiso guulaha saxaraha. Kaliya midho ansixiyay, cimilada la qalmi karo iyo kuudiyeyaasha nafaqada leh ayaan ka soo qaadnaa hoggamiyayaasha caalami ah.
seeds.vegSeedsDesc: Tamaandoor, basal, qaraha, iyo noocyo kale oo carrada maxalli u qalma.
seeds.fertilizersDesc: Isku-darka beeraha gaar ah si loo kordhiyo qaadashada nafaqada.
seeds.cropProtectionDesc: Xalallo maareyn cayayaanka iyo cudurrada deegaanka ilaaliya.
seeds.catalogDesc: Nala soo xiriir xirfadlayadeena liiska buuxa ee midho iyo alaabta ee gobolkaaga.

advisory.heroSubtitle: Isku-darka xirfada caalami ah iyo dhulka iyo aqoonta maxalli ah.
advisory.sectionTitle: Tilmaamaha Xirfadeed ee Beerta Fa'iido leh
advisory.sectionIntro: Kooxdeena agronomists xirfadeed waxay bixisaa taageero gacanta ah si aad ugu gaarto natiijooyinka ugu fiican ee hawlaha beeraha. Xogta adag waxaanu ugu beddelnaa stratejiyada duurka.
advisory.soilAnalysisDesc: Tijaabo faahfaahin leh si loo go'aamiyo u baahnaanta nafaqada.
advisory.cropPlanningDesc: Jadwalka nakhshadeed ee wax soo saarka sannadka oo dhan.
advisory.partnerDesc: Kordhi wax soo saarkaaga oo yar ka dhig dhaawaca adoo adeegyo la-talin xogta leh ee loo qalantay cimiladaaga micro.

irrigation.heroSubtitle: Nidaamyo maareyn biyaha aamin ah oo loo qorsheeyay adkaysiga cimilada.
irrigation.dripSystemsDesc: Biyo-mareen sax ah oo yaraynaya isticmaalka ilaa 50%.
irrigation.solarPumpingDesc: Xalallo karti ah ee deegaanka beeraha fog.
irrigation.irrigationDesignDesc: Qorsheyn hydraulic gaar ah ee beeraha dhammaan heerarka.
irrigation.transformingDesc: Xalalladayada biyo-mareen waxaa loo qorsheeyay in la furiyo awooda buuxda ee dhulkaaga. Laga bilaabo sahaminta goobta illaa damaanadaha, waxaanu hubinaynaa in dhibic kasta si wax ku ool ah loo isticmaalo.

programs.heroSubtitle: Dhisida bulshooyinka beeraha xooggan ee aqoon wadaag iyo koritaan.
programs.sectionIntro: Barwaaqo Agri Group waxay aaminsan tahay in horumarka waara ee la dhisayo ay ku xidhan yihiin iskaashiga xooggan ee beeraha maxalli ah. Barnaamijyadeena waxay diiradda saaraan helitaanka qalabka, amaahda, iyo suuqyada.
programs.outgrowerDesc: Habab beer iskaashi ah oo hubinaya helitaanka suuqa iyo tayada.
programs.technicalTrainingDesc: Workshop-yo joogto ah ee agronomy casri ah iyo dayactirka biyo-mareen.
programs.inputAccessDesc: Bridging-ga ee alaabta tayo sare ee bulshooyinka beeraha yar.
programs.readyToGrow: Diyaar u tahay inaad nala kori?

hero.subtitle: Laga bilaabo nidaamyo biyo-mareen pilot ilaa tijaabada midho ee gobolka, arag aragtideena dhisida nidaamyo beer ah oo adkaysan Bariga Afrika.

projects.caseStudyNotFoundDesc: Daraasadda kiisaska aad raadinayso ma jirto.

hero.subtitle: Sahaminta mustaqbalka beeraha Bariga Afrika ee xogta, cilmi-baariska, iyo stratejiyada duurka la tijaabiyay.

insights.articleNotFoundDesc: Maqalka aad raadinayso ma jiro ama waa la wareegay.

hero.title: Isku-Shirkeena Caalami Ah
hero.subtitle: Ku xidhida beeraha Bariga Afrika ee horumarka caalami ah, tignoolajiyada, iyo silsiladaha adeegga tayo sare leh.

benefits.label: Maxaad nala shaqeynaysaa?
benefits.title: Faa'iidada Nakhshadeed
benefits.marketAccessDesc: Gelitaan toos ah suuqa beeraha Bariga Afrika ee si degdeg ah u kordhaya.
benefits.localExpertiseDesc: Fahamka dheer ee carrada gobolka, cimilada, iyo xaaladaha sharci.
benefits.infrastructureDesc: Shabakadaha qaybinta la dhisay iyo awood gaadiid nakhshadeed.
benefits.sustainableImpactDesc: Ku biir mashruucyada saameyn weyn ee nolosha beddelaya ee xasilloonida cunnada hubinaya.

hero.title: Aan Wada Korino
hero.subtitle: Ha ahaato beeraha raadinaya talo ama ka-qaybqaatay caalami ah raadinaya fursadaha, kooxdeena waxay diyaar u tahay inay la xiriirto.

info.title: Macluumaadka Xiriirka
info.subtitle: Nala soo xiriir xafiisyadayada Bariga Afrika ee xalalka beeraha iyo fursadaha iskaashiga.
